summary: [major] WIN-014 / SEC-6.14 Crossley et al. 2013 anchor pointed to https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00024-022-03000-4 which is actually Bernard et al. 2022, Pure Appl. Geophys. 179, 1701–1727 (J9-Strasbourg intercomparison) — different authors, different year, different journal. Replaced with canonical Crossley, Hinderer & Riccardi (2013, Rep. Prog. Phys. 76, 046101) at DOI 10.1088/0034-4885/76/4/046101 (ADS 2013RPPh...76d6101C). In SEC-6.14 the conflated link was split: PATCH-358-F keeps Bernard et al. 2022 as separate, correctly-labeled J9-Strasbourg citation. Fixed in WIN-014 (PATCH-358-C) and SEC-6.14 (PATCH-358-F). EXP-358 review_class: verification — batchable per PROP-025. All replacement citations were independently verified via web search + direct page fetch; no verdict logic changes.
